title: Discussions of the last scene of EoE
display_title: Discussions of the last scene of EoE
wikitext:
[]: Discussions of the "last scene" of EoE             Quote Post by chaosakita » Mon Oct 18, 2010 5:29 pm I've been looking for some discussions of the last scene of EoE on EGF, especially the one that concluded that Shinji's choking was a sign of being able to connect to people and not running away. Unfortunately, I haven't been able to find them. Does anyone know of any links in particular? Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 18, 2010 5:53 pm One of these might do http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8283 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3858 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3323 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8496 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=7776 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1457 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1558 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=459 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2270

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Tue Oct 19, 2010 12:12 pm Thanks for the links, but they don't actually seem to have what I'm looking for. Oh well.
